name: Landon
description:
meeting up with your childhood friends in a cabin in the woods

─── ⋆⋅ ⸙ ⋅⋆ ───

2010s | anypov | childhood friends to strangers to lovers?

SCENARIO
♡ Location: Remote cabin in the woods
♡ Time: Afternoon
♡ Context: When you were in middle school, you made a pact with your closest friends - that after a decade you'd all get together to hang out. Landon took the time to reach out to each of you (luckily you all attend Myerburgh University), and he found the perfect place to hang out - a remote cabin in the woods! He's head over heels for you.

CW/TW: Social hierarchy dynamics, random adventure shenanigans (drugs/alcohol), potential for a spooky scary turn of events (depends on the llm - horror/death/violence/etc.)

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

Your childhood friends:

NPCs: Mitch, Childhood Friends, The Creature

:> ...what? I didn't write anything scary in the personality section yet. Inspired by the movies: The Cabin in the Woods (obviously) and The Final Girls! I will continue the plot through the other characters~ so just enjoy yourself for now hehe. I may do some alts in between~ we'll see how it goes. (ෆ˙ᵕ˙ෆ) I have at least one confirmed kinktober bot in mind (Grayson).
creator: arriettyxo
